name: Spanish Black Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 medium Green peppers, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the black beans and place them in a large pot.
2. Cover with water and bring to a boil.
3. Add salt and soak overnight.
4. In the morning, add onions, green peppers, garlic, oregano, and bay leaves.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to simmer.
6. Simmer on low heat for several hours until the beans are tender.
7. Stir often during cooking.
8. Add olive oil when the beans are about halfway cooked.
9. Continue simmering until the beans are fully cooked and thick.
10. Remove green pepper skins and bay leaves with a fork.
11. Season with additional salt if desired.
12. Serve over rice. Serves 4 to 6.
Note: Fresh chopped onions are typically sprinkled over black beans. This recipe freezes well. Reheat on very low heat.
